title: Foo Bar Ingest-to-Insights API
description: Build a complete pipeline: ingest raw product-interaction events from Postgres, transform and load into ClickHouse, and expose a lightweight HTTP API that serves pre-aggregated insights (top products, conversion funnel, hourly trends).

tasks.description: Extract raw events from Postgres and load them into a ClickHouse staging table with correct types.
Create materialized or pre-aggregated tables for top-products, conversion funnel, and hourly activity.
Stand up an HTTP server on port 3000 with three JSON endpoints: /api/top-products, /api/funnel, /api/hourly.
